'''lataha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadingness|leadingness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadingness|leadingness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lataha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætæhæth|lætæhæth]] || [[word:lætæhæj|lætæhæj]] || [[word:lætæhæsh|lætæhæsh]] || [[word:lætæhæ|lætæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:latatahath|latatahath]] || [[word:latatahaj|latatahaj]] || [[word:latatahash|latatahash]] || [[word:latataha|latataha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:latahath|latahath]] || [[word:latahaj|latahaj]] || [[word:latahash|latahash]] || [[word:lataha|lataha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:latafhath|latafhath]] || [[word:latafhaj|latafhaj]] || [[word:latafhash|latafhash]] || [[word:latafhaf|latafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latahatha|latahatha]] || [[word:latahaja|latahaja]] || [[word:latahasha|latahasha]] || [[word:latahaka|latahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latahath|latahath]] || [[word:latahaj|latahaj]] || [[word:latahash|latahash]] || [[word:lataha|lataha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latahathal|latahathal]] || [[word:latahajal|latahajal]] || [[word:latahashal|latahashal]] || [[word:latahakal|latahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latahathatha|latahathatha]] || [[word:latahajaja|latahajaja]] || [[word:latahashasha|latahashasha]] || [[word:latahaka|latahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latahathan|latahathan]] || [[word:latahajan|latahajan]] || [[word:latahashan|latahashan]] || [[word:latahakan|latahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latahathaoro|latahathaoro]] || [[word:latahajaoro|latahajaoro]] || [[word:latahashaoro|latahashaoro]] || [[word:latahakaoro|latahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
